howItWorks.intro: This evp frequency analysis calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Nyquist Frequency
rules.explanation: The highest frequency a digital recording can capture.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What frequency range are EVPs typically found?
faq.a: Most alleged EVPs fall in the 200-4000 Hz range, similar to human speech.

faq.q: What sample rate should I record at?
faq.a: 44.1 kHz minimum. Higher rates capture more frequency information.
